executive_summary_zh: 今天候选内容整体信号偏弱，主要来自 GitHub Changelog 的增量更新，缺少深度技术文章、评测方法或原创架构解读。
唯一相对值得关注的是 Copilot cloud agent 启动性能继续优化：通过 GitHub Actions custom images 预构建运行环境，云端 agent 启动再提升 20%，说明托管编码代理正在走向更重视冷启动、环境复现和反馈回路的工程化阶段。
对平台与工程效率负责人而言，这更像是一个产品运行机制信号，而不是可直接复用的技术方案公布。
executive_summary_en: The candidate set is weak today: it is mostly incremental GitHub Changelog updates, with no deep technical post, eval methodology, harness design, or original architecture write-up.

The only borderline high-signal item is the continued startup optimization of Copilot cloud agent: GitHub says agent startup is 20% faster by prebuilding runner environments with GitHub Actions custom images, signaling increasing engineering focus on cold-start latency, environment reproducibility, and tighter feedback loops for hosted coding agents.
For backend/platform/engineering leaders, this is more of a product-operating signal than a directly reusable technical disclosure.

items.title: Copilot cloud agent starts 20% faster with Actions custom images
items.summary_zh: GitHub 表示 Copilot cloud agent 通过采用 GitHub Actions custom images 预构建运行环境，使云端 agent 启动时间进一步缩短 20% 以上。该 agent 在 issue 分配、Agents tab 任务启动或 PR 中 @copilot 时会拉起云端环境执行工作；这次优化延续了其 3 月份已宣布的 50% 启动提速。
items.summary_en: GitHub says Copilot cloud agent now starts more than 20% faster by using GitHub Actions custom images to prebuild the runner environment. The cloud agent spins up when users assign an issue to Copilot, start a task from the Agents tab, or mention @copilot in a pull request; this follows a previously announced 50% startup improvement in March.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 对工程平台负责人而言，这揭示了托管式编码代理的一个关键基础设施方向：用户体验并不只取决于模型能力，还取决于环境冷启动、镜像预热、依赖复用和任务调度。随着 agent 越来越多地在云端执行真实仓库任务，运行环境工程会成为竞争核心。
items.why_it_matters_en: For platform and engineering leaders, this highlights a key infrastructure truth about hosted coding agents: user experience depends not just on model quality, but on cold-start latency, image prewarming, dependency reuse, and task scheduling. As agents increasingly execute real repo tasks in the cloud, runtime environment engineering becomes a core differentiator.
key_takeaways_zh: GitHub 将 Actions custom images 用于 Copilot cloud agent，说明编码 agent 与 CI 基础设施正在进一步收敛。
持续披露启动时间优化，表明 cloud agent 的实际可用性瓶颈之一是环境准备开销，而非单纯推理速度。
key_takeaways_en: GitHub is using Actions custom images for Copilot cloud agent, indicating further convergence between coding agents and CI infrastructure.
The repeated focus on startup improvements suggests that a major bottleneck for cloud agents is environment preparation overhead, not just model inference speed.

top_items: Copilot cloud agent starts 20% faster with Actions custom images
themes_zh: 托管式编码代理的冷启动优化
AI agent 运行时与 CI 基础设施融合
themes_en: Cold-start optimization for hosted coding agents
Convergence of AI agent runtime and CI infrastructure
implications_zh: 如果你在内部部署编码 agent，需要优先衡量环境启动时间、仓库预取、依赖缓存和镜像分层，而不是只比较模型基准分数。
未来 agent 平台的差异化可能更多体现在任务执行环境、权限隔离、缓存命中率和可观测性，而不只是聊天体验。
implications_en: If you are deploying coding agents internally, prioritize measuring environment startup time, repo prefetching, dependency caching, and image layering rather than comparing only model benchmark scores.
Future agent platform differentiation may come more from task execution environments, permission isolation, cache hit rates, and observability than from chat UX alone.
reading_order: Copilot cloud agent starts 20% faster with Actions custom images
what_to_ignore_zh: 聚合式 GitHub Changelog 首页与月归档页面，信息重复且缺少额外技术细节。
没有展开实现细节、评测方法或架构数据的零散功能更新，不足以支持今天的完整技术情报摘要。
what_to_ignore_en: The aggregate GitHub Changelog homepage and monthly archive pages, which are duplicative and add no technical detail.
Scattered feature updates that do not include implementation details, evaluation methods, or architectural data; they are insufficient for a full technical digest today.
